hook: ChatGPT gave me a 5-paragraph essay when I asked for help thinking through a decision. I wanted a sparring partner. It gave me a book report.
caption:
ChatGPT gave me a 5-paragraph essay when I asked for help thinking through a decision. I wanted a sparring partner. It gave me a book report.

Here's what actually happened:

Me: "Should I take the job offer or stay?"

Generic AI: "This is an important decision that requires careful consideration. On one hand, the new opportunity offers growth potential. On the other hand, stability has its own value. Here are 7 factors to consider..."

💀 I already know there are factors. I needed someone to push back on my reasoning.

Me, with my BootFile profile loaded:

Same question.

Calibrated AI: "You've framed this as security vs. growth — but you do that when you're avoiding the real question. What are you actually afraid of here? Because the salary difference isn't big enough to explain the hesitation."

That's it. That's the difference.

One response treats you like a stranger who needs information.

The other knows you default to analytical framing when you're emotionally stuck — and it calls you on it.

AI isn't dumb. It just doesn't know you yet.

Your BootFile profile fixes that.
